data.title: Replace eval infrastructure with deterministic skill testing
data.description:
## Context

The promptfoo eval infrastructure (llm-rubric assertions) is too flaky to gate commits — two layers of non-determinism (generator LLM + grader LLM) make it unreliable. 11 skill directories have eval configs, with supporting infrastructure (eval runner script, daily CI workflow, commit guard, documentation, scaffold script). No Claude Code plugin in the ecosystem has solved behavioral skill testing; the industry standard is manual testing. The most practical deterministic replacements are contract tests (verifying signal schemas) and referential integrity linting (verifying cross-file references exist). The existing eval infrastructure must be fully removed — including CI workflows, the commit guard, documentation, the scaffold script, and the promptfoo dependency — to avoid contradictory tooling.

## Success Criteria

- The promptfoo eval infrastructure is fully removed: eval configs (11 skill directories), eval runner script (run-skill-evals.sh), eval-related CI (eval-daily.yml workflow, eval-daily-runner.sh), CLAUDE.md references, promptfoo dependency, onboarding references, SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md, generate-skill-eval.sh, and the pre-commit eval config commit guard; all prompts, skills, and agents are verified to contain no references to the old eval/promptfoo system
- Skill/agent definition testing uses contract tests (signal schema validation) and referential integrity linting (verify referenced scripts, agents, contracts exist as real files) as deterministic pre-commit replacements for the removed evals

## Dependencies

None (can run in parallel with Epic 8df3-61d0 or Epic 1f75-9b32)

## Approach

Full removal of promptfoo infrastructure in a coordinated sweep: delete eval configs from all 11 skill directories, remove run-skill-evals.sh, remove eval-daily.yml and eval-daily-runner.sh CI workflows, remove SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md and generate-skill-eval.sh, remove the pre-commit eval config commit guard from record-test-status.sh, remove promptfoo from dependencies, remove onboarding references. Grep all prompts/skills/agents for remaining promptfoo/eval references. Add contract tests that validate signal schemas against their contract definitions. Add referential integrity linting that verifies skill-referenced scripts, agents, and contracts exist as real files — with graceful handling of renames.

## Research Reference

See plugins/dso/docs/designs/TESTING_RESEARCH.md and plugins/dso/docs/designs/TESTING_SESSION.md for full research findings and session context.
